description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Conan that runs on pull requests, pushes, and published releases. Use a matrix strategy to build librw on multiple platforms (Windows, Ubuntu, macOS) and with different configurations (null, gl3, d3d9). For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install Conan, create a host profile, download and build dependencies, build and package librw, create a binary package with CPack, and upload the package as a GitHub artifact.
